title: Almost Vanilla Armors
description: The Minecraft armors with a bit of personality
body:
# Almost Vanilla Armors
### About?
The Minecraft armors are a little boring, it just changes colors and have the same shape for every type (excluding netherite). I tried to "fix" them giving it some unique and recognizable textures, even though, the objective is to maintain the classic style of Minecraft.
##
### What exactly changed?
All pieces of armor changed to have unique features, netherite ones is already unique, so I didn't changed it.
The item form of the armors were changed to match the model.
- Copper: Take some inspiration of the copper blocks.
- Diamond: Tried to make a "chunkier" look, but not changing that much (as diamond is classic).
- Netherite: It's already unique so no changes here.
- Gold: A lighter look and focus on it's being visualy ostentatious.

![Armor ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a954a809f5661b8d4f0f046c9a71f3c542856d5d_0.webp)
## 
### General questions
**[1] Can I use it for my projects?:** sure, just give the credits if it is public.

**[2] Can you make it for older versions?:** no, I have no idea how to make it, but if someone wants to, do it (with credits)

**[3] Will it be updated?:** probably

**[4] Any mod support?:** none, for now at least 
## 
### Contact
Bug reports, tips, requests, or anything else: almostdelled@gmail.com
## 
### You may also like
I have made other resource packs with the objective of maintaining the Minecraft feeling while changing things up. Check them out!

- [Almost Vanilla Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-potions)

- [Almost Vanilla Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-tools)


- [Colored Enchantment Levels](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colored-enchantment-levels)
